dashboard.label: TA Triage Overview
dashboard.description: Sample searches for the triage custom search command.

p.code: index=edr sourcetype=crowdstrike:*Detection* | triage model=claude context_fields="UserName,CommandLine,Technique" | where triage_severity >= 7 | sort -triage_severity
index=edr sourcetype=crowdstrike:*Detection* | triage model=ollama ollama_url="http://localhost:11434" ollama_model="mistral"
index=edr sourcetype=crowdstrike:*Detection* | triage model=claude cache=true cache_ttl=3600 cache_key_fields="alert_name,src_ip"
